+ " alive for "
+ " exceeds MessageMaxSize "
+ " isE2EE="
+ " qos="
+ "#D %{private, mask.hash}sMLS binary blob size: %zu"
+ "#D %{private, mask.hash}sTerminating %zu chats on %s"
+ "#D Marking chat as terminated. %p"
+ "#D Received Spam ATHM Token. Moving on to retrieving PAT & Reputation Tokens qos=%u"
+ "#D Session associated with chat object is already terminated. %p"
+ "#E %{private, mask.hash}sunable to set CNI to %s"
+ "%{private, mask.hash}s%s skipDeinitReg=%{BOOL}d"
+ "%{private, mask.hash}sMO 1:1 Session Connected"
+ "%{private, mask.hash}sMO 1:1 Session Connected. created MLS group: %{bool}d"
+ "%{private, mask.hash}sMO Group Session Connected. created RCS group: %{bool}d, created MLS group: %{bool}d"
+ "%{private, mask.hash}sNeither r16MAV nor INT nor ARIS: set secondsUntilNextRetry to %ld"
+ "%{private, mask.hash}sconfig changed. Reinitializing with skipDeinitReg=%{BOOL}d."
+ "%{private, mask.hash}snew: removing unused connection, not resetting connection, and not resetOnDelete"
+ "%{private, mask.hash}soriginal: removing unused connection, resetting connection, and resetOnDelete"
+ "%{private, mask.hash}ssame as original: removing unused connection, resetting connection, and resetOnDelete"
+ "%{private, mask.hash}sskipped deinitializing transport"
+ "%{private, mask.hash}sskipped initializing transport becasue we have skipped deinitializing transport before"
+ "%{private, mask.hash}stransport hasn't changed. Reinitializing emergency stack, but skip deinitializing active emergency registration and transport"
+ ".invalid"
